channel.title: ClawForce Blog
channel.description: Security analysis, supply chain risks, and certification standards for AI agent skills.

item.title: The Complete Developer Toolchain for AI Agent Security
item.description: CLI, GitHub Action, VSCode extension, and SDKs: five tools that plug into workflows you already have. Here's how they work together.

item.title: The Real Cost of AI Coding Assistants: A Pricing Exposé
item.description: Hidden compute costs, upgrade spirals, and security blind spots make AI coding assistants far more expensive than advertised.

item.title: ClawForce vs Snyk vs Trail of Bits: A Developer's Perspective
item.description: How ClawForce compares to Snyk and Trail of Bits for AI agent security. Feature comparison, real pricing, and honest analysis.

item.title: Why Developers Don't Trust Legacy Security (And Shouldn't)
item.description: Legacy security tools optimize for compliance, not developers. False positives, hidden pricing, and enterprise friction.

item.title: The Identity Problem: Why SHA-256 Fails for AI Agent Skills
item.description: SHA-256 verifies file integrity but not publisher identity. Here's why that distinction matters for AI agent skills.
